title: 6cm Cake Toppers with Silver Diamante Rhinestones Diamonds and Rose Gold Base for Anniversary, Birthday Kids Children Adults Party
features: Crafted with beautiful silver Crystal Gems on rose gold base shaped numbers are shiny and 6cm (60mm) tall
This is a perfect glittery silver rhinestones cake topper which will add sparkles on your pictures or photoshoot
This comes with a metal rod attached to the number to use it as a cake topper
Material is made of Silver Crystal Rhinestones and rose gold alloy as a base
Size: 6cm tall and 4cm – 5cm wide (it varies depending on numbers)
description: Rhinestone Cake Toppers Sizes Available: 6cm Numbers Available: 10, 13, 16, 18, 21, 25, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80, 90 Beautiful cake toppers with AB Aurora Crystal gems on silver base shaped numbers. Why not add a touch of sparkle to that special birthday cake. They come individually wrapped for food standards. Could also be used for bouquets and arts and craft Let your imagination run wild
